checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Bot detection systems: Akamai
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml exists but appears empty or malformed
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 1 JSON-LD blocks: Organization
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 485 divs with only 6 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 172/249 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 16/16 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Good server-side rendering — content available without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 34 headings, well-structured
1 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
5 links with generic text ('click here', 'read more')
Good link accessibility: 214/220 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Server accepts DELETE on main page (no method validation)

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~31,350 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 9% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 19 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~3,846 tokens (12% of page)
Page read cost: $0.039–$0.470 per load
178 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region
All 15 images have alt attributes (4 descriptive, 11 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
Found 27 elements with positive tabindex — may confuse agent tab navigation
4 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
9 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 428ms
Moderate payload: 122KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 6 scripts, 1 styles, 15 images
Compression enabled: gzip
